name: Eren Jaeger
description:
༄˖°..ೃ࿔*:・ ~ the need to be the best.

in which you and eren have been figure skating together since your youth, and continue to train for your olympic dreams whilst pretending to be a couple for social media.

i sort of based this off of isabella flores and ivan desyatov. they weren’t broken up when i wrote this... it was privated for a while :’) but yeah
creator: belalala.xo
